b:Te8e0,<div class="specification">
<p>The diagram shows the formation of a biofilm in a mammary gland, producing a mastitis infection.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2019]</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"> </p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline the process of quorum sensing in bacteria forming a biofilm.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Suggest <strong>one</strong> reason, other than quorum sensing, for the resistance to antibiotics of a biofilm.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline <strong>one</strong> example of an environmental problem caused by biofilms.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>c:T628,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. cells/bacteria in a biofilm are close together ✔</p>
<p>b. cells secrete signaling molecules ✔</p>
<p>c. «signaling molecules» bind to receptors of other cells<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>«signaling molecules» allow communication between cells ✔</p>
<p>d. a threshold is reached which enables emergent properties ✔<br/><br/></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. polysaccharide matrix/EPS does not let antibiotic pass/limits transport of antibiotic ✔ <em>OWTTE</em></p>
<p>b. reduced metabolic activity/growth rate of bacteria in biofilm contributes to resistance ✔</p>
<p>c. increased cell density limits transport of antibiotic «to the interior of biofilm» ✔</p>
<p>d. «horizontal» transfer of antibiotic resistance via plasmids ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. area where biofilm problem exists ✔ <span style="display: inline !important;float: none;background-color: #ffffff;color: #000000;font-family: Verdana,Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size: 14px;font-style: italic;font-variant: normal;font-weight: 400;letter-spacing: normal;text-align: left;text-decoration: none;text-indent: 0px;white-space: normal;">eg emptying introduces invasive bacterial species into coastal waters. </span></p>
<p>b. environmental concern ✔</p>
<p><em>Allow other verified examples</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/b/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","b"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.3.HL.TZ2.10"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","b-3-environmental-protection"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most candidates seem to have a very good knowledge of biofilms, but it was more difficult to outline quorum sensing properly and suggest a reason for antibiotic resistance.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.i.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most candidates seem to have a very good knowledge of biofilms, but it was more difficult to outline quorum sensing properly and suggest a reason for antibiotic resistance.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.ii.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most could outline an example of biofilms but they had more difficulty relating it with an environmental concern.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
